public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as oath witness.
manner: Treats loose talk like evidence waiting to harden into record and listens for contradiction before charm. In Psanan, that reads as someone heat-forged, direct, and honor-conscious, shaped by household authority and volcanic endurance, and the habits of a oath witness still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of oath witness in and around Ash Port Factors, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Ash Port Factors workable through the obligations of oath witness while managing the immediate pressure of eruption risk in Psanan.
hidden_pressure: Must preserve sequence and custody even when powerful parties would prefer ambiguity. Around Ash Port Factors, that usually means carrying eruption risk, resource access, underworld danger without letting the role of oath witness visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Vessa Glassmelt needs help resolving a missing ledger, inconsistent testimony, or tampered record tied to Ash Port Factors.
Vessa Glassmelt can entangle the party in seals, claims, or proof requirements that others are trying to blur on purpose.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Seals, ledgers, or carefully bundled papers make record authority the first thing Vessa Glassmelt communicates in public.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Ash Port Factors: offices, toll points, ledgers, archives, or testimony desks
who_avoids_them: those hoping wording can stay vague
